caribbean.headline: Persistent Rain and Choppy Seas for St. Lucia
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing light easterly winds near 12 kt, seas to 5.6 ft with an E swell at a 7 s period, and 100% rain probability at the port. I’m also monitoring Grenada where winds are around 14 kt and brief heavy showers and squalls may reduce visibility, so mariners should secure loose gear and expect choppy coastal conditions.

mediterranean.headline: NNE Winds Raise 6 ft Seas Near Mykonos
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing NNE winds up to 25 kt with seas to 6.0 ft and a 6 s NNE swell; rain remains less than 10% rain probability. I, James Van Fleet, note Cadiz will see lighter winds near 19 kt and generally smaller seas, and I advise mariners to expect moderate short‑period chop near Mykonos and to secure small craft accordingly.
